summary: Phase 3 full E2E validation passed. Backend: 8/8 pytest cases green (news 3 categories with real BR sources incl. G1/InfoMoney/CNN/Só Notícia Boa/Razões etc, all items with title/summary/source/url/published_at/image; diary/stats returns 7 days + totals and correctly reflects new diary entries; all endpoints correctly return 401 without cookie). Frontend: login → /rotina; 5 themes (lavender-mint, sunset-peach, ocean-turquoise, forest-amber, rose-gold) all apply the expected --c1 CSS var instantly and persist across reload via localStorage; MundoHoje shows real news cards per category (Política 5, Economia 10, Boas 5) with source label, relative time ('há 21 min'), and 'Ler matéria' link with target=_blank pointing to real g1.globo.com etc; category switching + refresh work; WeeklyStats renders 3 stat cards + recharts BarChart (21 rectangles = 7 days × 3 series) and auto-refreshes after saving a diary day (gratidoes 0 → 1). Regression: task create/delete OK.

ui_bugs.issue: On narrow mobile viewport (<=420px width) the fixed 'Made with Emergent' badge (bottom-right) visually overlaps the rightmost element of the bottom nav — now the palette (theme-toggle-btn) — and intercepts pointer events, making the theme selector unclickable for real mobile users. Same root cause as iteration_1 (previously affected tab-diario). At 500px viewport the badge sits below the nav and everything works. Only reproducible visually on narrow screens.

action_items: Recommended: shift Emergent badge above bottom nav on mobile (or increase nav's right-side reserved space / raise nav z-index above badge, or move ThemeSelector left of Diário tab). Currently theme button is unreachable via tap on ~iPhone-width devices.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~640 lines with news + auth + diary + tasks in one file — consider splitting into routers (auth.py, news.py, diary.py, tasks.py) once the app grows beyond phase 3.

GET /api/news cache is global (key='current'), not per-user. Acceptable because news is user-agnostic, but note the 30-min TTL is silent — a stale hit still returns 200 with old data even if all upstream feeds went down. Consider returning a 'generated_at' timestamp inside the payload for the client.
diary_stats aggregates in Python by iterating the day's docs (fine for personal-scale). If usage grows, switch to a Mongo aggregation pipeline with $group by date.
MotivationToast: appears then disappears — during automated test toast was already gone at check time (probably by design). No user-facing bug.
seed_data_creation: None persisted — one temporary diary entry created and deleted; one temporary task created and deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 features (real news via RSS, WeeklyStats with recharts, 5-theme selector w/ localStorage persistence + CSS var swap) are verified working end-to-end. The only outstanding UX issue is the Emergent badge overlapping the bottom nav on narrow mobile viewports — this was already noted in iteration_1 for tab-diario; in Phase 3 the ThemeSelector now sits at that same overlapped position. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py — re-run with `pytest tests/test_phase3.py -v` from /app/backend.
